text: The system shall allow for multiple file upload to be configured on a per-page basis.
The system shall allow actors to organize their voice clips into a portfolio.
The system shall allow actors to download their voice clips in a format such as MPEG Audio (mp3).
The system shall store audio clips in a format optimized for speech.
The system shall allow actors to delete recorded clips.
The system shall allow web feeds to be turned on or off on a per-page basis.
The system shall allow an actor to search through pages in a course.
The system shall display a search box on every page after an actor has logged in.
The system shall allow a course administrator to grade an assignment.
The system should display grade information to the appropriate actor.
The system should maintain a history of grades for a particular assignment.
The system shall provide a wiki where actors can collaboratively create networks of documents.
The system shall provide a blog engine.
The system shall provide both e-mail and SMS notifications for pages.
The system should provide a simple and responsive interface.
The system shall be backed up on a nightly basis.
The system shall restore back-up data within six hours.
The system should be available 24 hours a day and 7 days a week.
The system should support at least 1000 concurrent users.
The system shall be maintainable without substantial modification.
The system shall provide relevant online documentation for users on each page.
The system shall provide system administrators with access to comprehensive and searchable documentation.
